ddls:
CREATE TABLE "lsoa_areas" (
  "lsoa_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each LSOA area */,
  "lsoa_code" TEXT /* Code for the LSOA area */,
  "lsoa_name" TEXT /* Name of the LSOA area */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the LSOA area is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the LSOA area */,
  "area_size" REAL /* Physical size of the LSOA area in square kilometers */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the LSOA area */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the LSOA area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lsoa_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_bands" (
  "size_band_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size band */,
  "size_band_name" TEXT /* Name of the size band (e.g., 4 kW) */,
  "min_capacity" REAL /* Minimum capacity for the size band */,
  "max_capacity" REAL /* Maximum capacity for the size band */,
  "average_usage" REAL /* Average electricity usage for the size band */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size band was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size band was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_band_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "electricity_demand" (
  "demand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demand record */,
  "lsoa_id" INTEGER /* ID of the LSOA area */,
  "size_band_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size band */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the demand is recorded */,
  "quarter" INTEGER /* Quarter for which the demand is recorded */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for which the demand is recorded */,
  "demand_value" REAL /* Demand value for the given year */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Source type of the data (e.g., actual, estimate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_electricity_demand_lsoa_id FOREIGN KEY ("lsoa_id") REFERENCES lsoa_areas ("lsoa_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_electricity_demand_size_band_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_band_id") REFERENCES size_bands ("size_band_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Name of the year */,
  "is_historical" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the year is historical */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projections" (
  "projection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each projection record */,
  "lsoa_id" INTEGER /* ID of the LSOA area */,
  "size_band_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size band */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the projection is made */,
  "projection_value" REAL /* Projected demand value for the given year */,
  "model_used" TEXT /* Forecasting model used for the projection */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the projection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("projection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projections_lsoa_id FOREIGN KEY ("lsoa_id") REFERENCES lsoa_areas ("lsoa_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projections_size_band_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_band_id") REFERENCES size_bands ("size_band_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, administrator) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "lsoa_id" INTEGER /* ID of the LSOA area */,
  "size_band_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size band */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_lsoa_id FOREIGN KEY ("lsoa_id") REFERENCES lsoa_areas ("lsoa_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_size_band_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_band_id") REFERENCES size_bands ("size_band_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user generating the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the report file */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., monthly, annual) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
